subject: Tax Invoice INV-2026-0005 – AdviserLogic & Licensee Solutions (May 2026)
preview: Attached is your May tax invoice for AdviserLogic, Licensee Solutions, and Morningstar research/data services.
body:
Dear Accounts Payable Team,

Please find attached tax invoice #INV-2026-0005 for AdviserLogic practice management, Licensee Solutions compliance services, and Morningstar Australian research and data feeds for the May 2026 service period.

Customer Number: C-0044219
Contract Number: MS-AU-778421
Contract Term: 01-Jul-2025 to 30-Jun-2026
Total Amount: AUD 11,748.00 (incl. GST 10%)
Due Date: June 16, 2026
Payment Terms: Net 30

Please reference the invoice and customer number with payment. Submit remittance details to remittances.au@morningstar.com or fax +61 2 9276 4545. Questions? Call +61 2 9276 4444.

Thank you,
Morningstar Australasia Pty Limited – Accounts Receivable
